answer:
A cell is defined as the basic level at which life exists [Page 1].

All living organisms are composed of cells [Page 1]. These organisms can be:
*   **Unicellular:** Consisting of only one cell, such as bacteria or yeast [Page 1].
*   **Multicellular:** Made up of millions of cells that work together, such as plants, fish, birds, or humans [Page 1].
